from heapq import heappush, heappop

N = len(grid)
directions = [(-1, 0), (1, 0), (0, -1), (0, 1)]
visited = set()
pq = [(grid[i][j], (i, j), 1, [grid[i][j]]) for i in range(N) for j in range(N)]
heapq.heapify(pq)

        return path

            new_path = path + [grid[nx][ny]]
            heappush(pq, (tuple(new_path), (nx, ny), length + 1, new_path))
            visited.add((nx, ny, length + 1))
